zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Burdett於1384年出生在英國爾時，她的父親John Burdett Sir37歲，母親Katherine Arderne62歲。她於1399年與Humphrey Stafford在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾德雷頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1419年2月20日在英國武斯特斯爾伍斯特享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Burdett于1384年出生在英国爾时，她的父亲John Burdett Sir37岁，母亲Katherine Arderne62岁。她于1399年与Humphrey Stafford在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾德雷頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1419年2月20日在英国武斯特斯爾伍斯特享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Burdett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Midlands, of Norman origin): perhaps from an Old French personal name Burdet, a pet form of an unrecorded ancient Germanic name, Burdo, or from Gaulish burdo ‘mule’.

variants.name: Burditt
meanings: English (Northamptonshire and Leicestershire, of Norman origin): variant of   Burdett  .

variants.name: Burdette
meanings: Altered form of French Burdet, a cognate of Burdin . Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

variants.name: Burden
meanings: (southern England, of Norman origin): from a diminutive of the ancient Germanic personal name Burdo, for which compare Burdett . Burdonus and other derivatives of the Gaulish personal name Burdo (‘mule’) are found in France, where it is rare and the similar French surname may derive instead from Old French bourdon in the sense ‘pilgrim's staff’ (compare Bourdon 1). The personal name, whether of ancient Germanic or Gaulish origin, does occur in medieval England, but rarely.

habitational name from any of various places called Burdon or Burden. Burden in Yorkshire and Great Burdon in County Durham are named with Old English burh ‘stronghold, fortified place’ + dūn ‘hill’; Burdon in Tyne and Wear is named with Old English b̄re ‘byre’ + denu ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Burdett was born in 1384, in Cheshire, England, her father, John Burdett Sir, was 37 and her mother, Katherine Arderne, was 62. She married Humphrey Stafford in 1399, in Drayton, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 20 February 1419, in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Burdett est née en 1384, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, John Burdett Sir, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Katherine Arderne, avait 62 ans. Elle a épousé Humphrey Stafford en 1399, à Drayton, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 20 février 1419, à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Burdett 1384 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Burdett Sir 37 und ihre Mutter Katherine Arderne 62. Sie hat 1399 in Drayton, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Humphrey Stafford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 20. Februar 1419 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Worcester, Worcestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Burdett è nata il nel 1384 nel Cheshire, England, sua padre, John Burdett Sir, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Katherine Arderne, aveva 62 anni. Lei sposato Humphrey Stafford nel 1399, nel Drayton, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 20 febbraio 1419, nel Worcester, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Burdettが1384年にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Burdett Sirは37歳，母Katherine Arderneは62歳であった。1399年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアドレイトンでHumphrey Staffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1419年2月20日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Burdett(이)가 1384년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Burdett Sir(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Arderne(은)는 62세였다. 그녀는 1399년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 드라이턴에서 Humphrey Stafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1419년 2월 20일 영국 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Burdett nasceu em 1384, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Burdett Sir, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Arderne, tinha 62 anos. Ela casou-se com Humphrey Stafford em 1399, em Drayton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 20 de fevereiro de 1419, em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Burdett родилась в 1384 г. в местности чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Burdett Sir было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Arderne, 62. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Humphrey Stafford в 1399 г. в местности дреитон, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 20 февраля 1419 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Burdett nació en 1384, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Burdett Sir, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Katherine Arderne, tenía 62 años. Se casó con Humphrey Stafford en 1399, en Drayton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 20 de febrero de 1419, en Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años.
